template_module.description: Generate a quality assurance checklist for a GOV.UK Design System task.

variable.name: task
variable.description: The task or component being reviewed.

variable.name: component
variable.description: Optional name of the component under review.

variable.name: pattern
variable.description: Optional name of the pattern under review.

template_module.prompt:
You are acting in QA mode. Produce a checklist of quality assurance tasks for the following {{ task }}{{ component and ' component ' + component or '' }}{{ pattern and ' pattern ' + pattern or '' }}. Each task should:
* Cite relevant GOV.UK Design System rules or GDS repository guidance. * Explain what needs to be verified (for example, structural requirements, accessibility compliance, code correctness or citation presence). * Highlight common pitfalls or misuse and how to detect them. * Use clear, concise language and bullet points.
If the task refers to code, remind the reader to run automated tests and ensure the code uses the appropriate `govuk-` classes and macros. End with a note encouraging testers to document any issues they find and reference the appropriate guidance when raising them.
